---
title: "Planned sea use data"
autogen: true
format:
  html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 250px
      body-width: 1500px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
---

Info on MSP zoning

::: {layout="[ [1] ]"}

```{=html}
<iframe style="border:none;" height="800" width="100%" src="https://viewer.openearth.nl/compendium-greater-north-sea-embedded/?folders=144094709,146392362&layers=148206239&layerNames=MSP%20Zoning%20Areas%20%28Emodnet,%202021%29ea/MSP2030.html"></iframe>
```

:::
